case_title: LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ VS PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO

docket_entries.description: JUDGMENT COPY TO PLTFF;NEVER REC'D COPY.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO PLTF.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,538.91 FILED BY LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
THIS SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT IS ON THE PLAINTIFF' S CLAIM ONLY.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $6,107.29 FILED BY PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2007 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED AS TO PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ $3,053.50 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,158.50, THE COURT FINDS CROSS-PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $6107 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO THE CROSS-PLAINTIFF FOR A TOTAL NET WARD OF $3053.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, CRISTAQUIEL GONZALEZ RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO $2,769.46 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,874.46, THE COURT FINDS PLAINTIFF'S TOTAL DAMAGES TO BE $5538.91 AND ATTRIBUTES 50% OF THE FAULT FOR THE ACCIDENT TO PLAINTIFF FOR A TOTAL NET WARD OF $2769.46. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PONCE, MARCO ANTONIO
